headline: Man's 'Emotional Support Water Bottle' Has A Name, A Bedtime, And A Better Social Life Than Him
summary: Hydrangea the Bottle has 47,000 followers. Jake has 12. 'I'm proud of him,' Jake said.
fullBody: Jake Hydration named his water bottle Hydrangea. Hydrangea has an Instagram, a schedule, and a fan base. 'He's very supportive,' Jake said. Hydrangea has 47,000 followers. Jake has 12. 'Hydrangea is thriving,' Jake said. Jake has started a podcast called 'Conversations with Hydrangea.' The bottle doesn't speak. It just holds water. It's more popular than Jake. 'I'm okay with that,' Jake said. 'He's humble.' Hydrangea is a water bottle.
